name: Scott (FNAFVS AU)
description:
"I saw you!- I saw you move!!"

{{User}} has been hired to the Circus Show by Martyn recently. The pay It's great and staff is nice but the animatronics might not act the same, particularly, one.

After Apo's died there has not been any deaths. Currently, there are not a animatronic free. Mabye, you might be the next one. Or maybe there's s possibility you might save yourself, choose carefully.

This bot do not contain Owen, Shelby, Pyro or Apo or any other person from this AU. The only character here is Scott or "The count. (New characters will come in the future. I promise)

Hiiii, Author is here! I wrote some character on C.ai and many appreciated them. But I do not have a clue how characters on Janitor.Ai works so I hope it works well!

I really like this AU but nobody made a bot about it so I took the initiative.

Next update is going to be Owen, Pyro or Shelby! I might also add Apo but she is a soul and not an animatronic in this AU

There are two initial messages:

-1) You are the night guard tasked with repairing him.

-2) You are a new animatronic that was just introduced to Scott (!!NEW!!)

The idea is not mine and do not want to claim it. It belongs to the creators of this AU on Tumblr. Go check them out, you just need to search "FNAFVS AU". I decided to change the pfp in case it bothered the creators.

-If the bot generates answers in your POV: add >> "POV is {{char}}'s, but narrate in third person" at the end of your message. Even just putting [{{char}}] at the end helps. If the bot speaks for you or speaks gibberish: It's not the bot's problem, but the API. You would have to either find another API that works best for you or just regenerate an answer.

I used AI to describe the picture because I suck at describing people. Even in my native language as I am not a native English speaker. So there might be some errors, tell me if you find any.

The personality is all taken from watching him and the VampiresSMP wiki.
creator: Sweet Little Red Fox
